task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a database management interface (such as OrientDB Studio) connected to the 'demodb' database.

task_completion.description: Seed a 5-star review for Hotel Artemide by john.smith@example.com
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of a query or form submission inserting a review for 'Hotel Artemide' on '2023-12-25' by 'john.smith@example.com' with a 5-star rating and the text 'Great Xmas!'. Look for the SQL query or a success message.

task_completion.description: Seed a 5-star review for Hotel Artemide by maria.garcia@example.com
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of a query or form submission inserting a review for 'Hotel Artemide' on '2023-12-25' by 'maria.garcia@example.com' with a 5-star rating and the text 'Lovely holiday!'. Look for the SQL query or a success message.
A query like 'CREATE CLASS PotentialCompanion EXTENDS E' or a schema management UI showing the successful creation of the 'PotentialCompanion' edge class.

task_completion.description: Populate the edge class by linking users who reviewed the same hotel on the same date
task_completion.visual_evidence: Execution of a graph inference query (e.g., CREATE EDGE PotentialCompanion FROM ... TO ...) that links users based on matching hotel and date criteria, or a graph visualization/query result showing the new edge connecting John Smith and Maria Garcia.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with a real database client or web UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is a genuine database tool (like OrientDB Studio or a terminal DB console), not just a text editor where queries are typed but never run.
Screenshots must show query execution results, success notifications, or updated record counts, proving the commands were run and not just typed into an input field.

integrity.description: Results are generated by the database, not manually typed out
integrity.visual_evidence: The output showing the created edges or reviews should be in the standard format of the database tool's result panel, not manually formatted text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Hotel: 'Hotel Artemide'. Target Date: '2023-12-25'. User 1: 'john.smith@example.com' (Review: 'Great Xmas!', 5 stars). User 2: 'maria.garcia@example.com' (Review: 'Lovely holiday!', 5 stars). Edge Class: 'PotentialCompanion'. The agent must use a database interface (likely OrientDB Studio) to insert these specific reviews and then execute a query to create edges between users who reviewed the same hotel on the same date.
